issues.objection: The STRETCHED tag is appropriate. The engineering layer does not collapse the Advaita-Vishishtadvaita-Gaudiya distinctions in the source pack; instead it stays at the operational layer (restraint operates from layer above kāma's seat) and explicitly notes where the metaphysical claim exceeds what the analog carries. The disagreements section preserves tradition-specific readings honestly. Acceptable.

notes: Tradition handling: the source pack lists 4 traditions (Gaudiya Vaishnava, Modern devotional, Advaita, Vishishtadvaita) and the disagreements_among_translators preserves their specific readings without conflation. Engineering body does not use a tradition-specific reading without flagging. STRETCHED tag honors the metaphysical depth the analog cannot carry. Pass.
